response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with roughly 19 years of hands-on experience, open-source founder experience, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators). However, the role is a director-level principal position centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows no recognized AI/ML expertise, no AI-related advanced degree, no shipped AI products or platforms at scale, and no evidence of engineering leadership or strategic advisory work at the level required. The trajectory is that of an excellent individual contributor in web and systems development, not a principal-level AI strategist.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms, the core of this role
No director-level or organizational engineering leadership experience; career has stayed at senior/staff IC scope
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of strategic advisory work with customers or executives

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap versus director-level strategy role
Meets 15-year experience bar with entrepreneurial and recent AI-tooling exposure
